steps.formalization:
PREDICATES:
bald_eagle(x) ::: x is the bald eagle
rough(x) ::: x is rough
needs_bear(x) ::: x needs the bear
dog(x) ::: x is a dog
bear(x) ::: x is the bear
nice(x) ::: x is nice
chase(x,y) ::: x chases y
eat(x,y) ::: x eats y
cold(x) ::: x is cold

PREMISES:
forall x (not bald_eagle(x) -> not rough(x))
forall x (bear(x) -> not bald_eagle(x))
forall x (dog(x) -> needs_bear(x))
forall x (rough(x) -> chase(x,bald_eagle()))
forall x (needs_bear(x) -> not blue(x))
forall x (nice(x) -> chase(x,bald_eagle()))
forall x (eat(x,bald_eagle()) -> rough(x))
forall x (cold(x) -> chase(x,bear()) -> rough(bear()))
forall x (eat(x,bear()) -> needs_bear(x) -> not eat(bear(),bald_eagle()))
forall x (dog(x) -> nice(x) -> eat(x,bald_eagle()))
forall x (needs_bear(x) -> eat(x,bald_eagle()))

CONCLUSION:
needs_bear(dog())
